site.name: SPINDEX
site.tagline: The Beyblade X catalog & combo lab
site.description: Browse every Beyblade X blade, lock chip, ratchet and bit — then mix, match and share your ultimate combo.

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.subtitle: Update your public profile and account password.

profile.imageType: Use a PNG, JPG or WebP image.

admin.title: Superadmin
admin.subtitle: Search signed-up bladers, adjust stars, overwrite profiles and reset passwords.
admin.forbidden: This account is not a superadmin.
admin.loginRequired: Log in with a superadmin account.
admin.deleteConfirm: Remove {handle}? This disables the account and may anonymize the profile if battle history must be kept.
admin.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot remove your own admin account.

home.heroSubtitle: The complete Beyblade X parts catalog — every blade, lock chip, assist blade, ratchet and bit with images, tiers and stats. Mix, match, and share your build with one link.
home.featuredSub: The current kings of the Xtreme stadium, ranked by community tournament data.
home.how1Text: Every Beyblade X part in one place — searchable in English and Chinese, with type, tier and product info.
home.how2Text: Pick a Blade, Ratchet and Bit. CX builds also expose Lock Chip and Assist Blade slots.
home.how3Text: Your combo lives in the link. Copy it, send it, and anyone opens exactly the build you made.

catalog.subtitle: parts in the database
catalog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name (English / 中文) or code…

part.powerNote: Editorial rating derived from type and community tier.

builder.title: Combo Builder
builder.subtitle: Assemble your Beyblade X — the share link IS your build.
builder.incomplete: Pick a blade, ratchet and bit to complete your combo. CX also needs a lock chip and assist blade.
builder.cxNote: CX blade — add a Lock Chip and Assist Blade
builder.strategySubtitle: Build the opponent combo, compare stats, and generate a match plan.
builder.loginForStrategy: Log in to unlock AI matchup strategy.
builder.strategyError: Could not generate strategy. Try again.
builder.strategyLimitReached: Daily AI limit reached. Cached matchups still work; try new matchups tomorrow.
builder.strategyCached: Cached result — no daily use spent.
builder.strategyFallback: Showing local fallback because AI is unavailable.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.subtitle: The top-ranked bladers in the community, by wins and stars.
rankings.comboSubtitle: Real tournament results — the winningest Beyblade X combos, ranked.
rankings.publicPlayersSub: Ranked by confirmed wins, stars, and win rate.
rankings.note: Based on community-reported tournament results (Taiwan meta), aggregated by the stan-yao tier project.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.subtitle: How official battles are scored, common formats, and where to compete.
tournaments.scoringIntro: A Beyblade X match is a race to 4 points — you score by how you win each round:
tournaments.overDesc: You knock the opponent out of the stadium.
tournaments.burstDesc: You break the opponent apart mid-battle.
tournaments.xtremeDesc: You blast the opponent out through the Xtreme Zone.
tournaments.winCondition: First blader to 4 points takes the match.
tournaments.f1Desc: Classic knockout brackets — lose once (or twice) and you're out. The standard for most Challonge events.
tournaments.f2Desc: Everyone plays a fixed number of rounds against similarly-scored opponents; top finishers advance to a final bracket.
tournaments.f3Desc: Bring a deck of 3 combos with no repeated parts. The winner keeps their Bey on the stadium; take all three rounds to win.
tournaments.hostIntro: Host a simple bracket, pick a format, and let players join the lineup.
tournaments.loginToHost: Log in to host or join
tournaments.hostFormatSingleDesc: Lose once and you are out.
tournaments.hostFormatDoubleDesc: Lose twice and you are out.
tournaments.hostFormatSwissDesc: Pair players with similar scores each round.
tournaments.hostFormatFreeForAllDesc: Many players per match, winners advance.
tournaments.hostFormatLeaderboardDesc: Rank players by points or results.

gatherings.title: Gathering
gatherings.subtitle: Host a Beyblade meet with place, time, fee and simple joining.
gatherings.loginToJoin: Log in to host or join

market.title: Marketplace
market.subtitle: Buy, sell and pre-order parts with other bladers.
market.noticeTitle: Marketplace preview — transactions are not enabled yet
market.noticeText: Buying, selling and pre-ordering on SPINDEX are still under development, so every checkout button below is disabled. Until launch, purchase through the reference store or your local club.
market.p2pText: Sell spare blades, ratchets and bits directly to other bladers — photos, condition grades, meet-up or postage. A preview of what's coming:

about.title: About SPINDEX
about.p1: SPINDEX is built and maintained by SPINDEX Malaysia, a team of Beyblade X bladers and collectors.
about.p2: The goal: give bladers everywhere — in English and Chinese — one clean place to study every part, theory-craft combos, follow the competitive meta, and find people to battle.
about.sig: See you in the stadium. — SPINDEX Malaysia

footer.disclaimer: SPINDEX is an unofficial fan project. Beyblade X, all part names and product images are trademarks of Takara Tomy / Hasbro. No affiliation.

notFound.title: LOST IN THE XTREME ZONE
notFound.text: This page burst out of the stadium.
